disclosureBoundary.rolloutRule: Rollout guides may expose lane ids, validation commands, redacted failure classes, and proof roots; they must not expose secrets, protected source, raw protected prompts, wallet private material, or unpaid AssetPack source.

rows.title: Contributor onboarding path
rows.purpose: Bring a contributor from canon reading to gate-quality proof without relying on unstated repository folklore.
guideExamples: Read active canon pointer, read V35 draft family, branch from version/v35, and close only one gate scope.
Use source-safe generated artifacts and package-owned helpers before updating public docs.
rows.failClosedResult: contributor_onboarding rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Local development path
rows.purpose: Run the website, protocol packages, and demonstration checks locally with source-safe environment posture.
guideExamples: Use mock-mode interface proof for local inspection before staging-testnet validation.
Use package tests for source-owned protocol objects before route or interface wiring.
knownBlockers: protocol demonstration dependency imported into package source
rows.failClosedResult: local_development rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Operator use path
rows.purpose: Trace telemetry, dashboards, alerts, runbooks, and repair commands from a source-safe rollout view.
guideExamples: Start from telemetry family and event ids, then inspect the mapped dashboard panel and runbook id.
Record only redacted error classes, proof roots, lane ids, and repair result in operator notes.
knownBlockers: incident note attempts to include secrets
rows.failClosedResult: operator_use rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Enterprise reader flow
rows.purpose: Explain the safe testnet path from Read request through Need review, FindingFits, AssetPack preview, settlement, and delivery.
guideExamples: Before settlement the reader sees measurements, provenance posture, proof roots, and non-source preview metadata.
After settlement the reader receives the source-bearing AssetPack through the delivery path proven by receipts.
knownBlockers: ledger and database receipt roots disagree
rows.failClosedResult: enterprise_reader_flow rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Depositor flow
rows.purpose: Explain source deposit, measurement, eligibility, and rights posture without exposing protected deposited source.
guideExamples: Depositor guidance may explain repository anchoring, proof roots, rights posture, and payout receipts.
Depositor guidance must not include protected source units or buyer-private Read context.
knownBlockers: deposit source material missing proof root
protected source visible in rollout docs
rows.failClosedResult: depositor_flow rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Interface consumer flow
rows.purpose: Expose API, MCP API, ChatGPT App, and public docs consumption paths as source-safe rollout material.
guideExamples: Interface examples may include route names, action ids, authorization posture, and redacted payload shapes.
Interface examples must not include secrets, source-bearing AssetPacks, or raw protected prompt material.
knownBlockers: tool contract not bound to telemetry proof hook
rows.failClosedResult: interface_consumer_flow rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Environment lane posture
rows.purpose: Keep local, staging-testnet, public testnet, mainnet-ready dry run, and blocked value-bearing mainnet explicitly distinct.
guideExamples: Public testnet and mainnet-ready dry run can prove posture without value-bearing source unlock.
Value-bearing mainnet remains visible as blocked and has no admitted runtime hosts in V35.
knownBlockers: lane id omitted from rollout guide
mainnet-ready dry run attempts value-bearing broadcast
value-bearing mainnet unblocked before future canon
secret scope not bound to lane
rows.failClosedResult: environment_lane_posture rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Wallet and settlement caveats
rows.purpose: Make BTC fee, BTD rights transfer, finality, and source unlock boundaries explicit before testnet rollout.
guideExamples: Local and staging-testnet settlement are rehearsals with proof roots and no value-bearing mainnet unlock.
Rights transfer and source delivery are admitted only after settlement receipts and projection readback agree.
knownBlockers: wallet policy does not match lane
source unlock attempted before paid rights transfer
rows.failClosedResult: wallet_settlement_caveats rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Known blockers
rows.purpose: Make rollout blockers auditable, source-safe, and fail-closed before public testnet or mainnet dry-run claims.
guideExamples: Known blockers should name source-safe failure classes, repair references, validation commands, and blocked lanes.
A blocker must not include provider credentials, wallet private material, protected source, or unpaid AssetPack source.
knownBlockers: mainnet value-bearing admission requested before future canon
rows.failClosedResult: known_blockers rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete

rows.title: Rehearsal evidence
rows.purpose: Bind rollout guides to reproducible local and staging-testnet rehearsal proof roots before Gate 9 rehearsal depth.
guideExamples: Rollout readiness can cite local and staging-testnet proof roots now, while Gate 9 later rehearses V35 telemetry/docs visibility.
Promotion reviewers should require blocked value-bearing mainnet evidence to remain visible until future canon changes admission.
rows.failClosedResult: rehearsal_evidence rollout guidance blocks when lane, proof, disclosure, or rehearsal evidence is incomplete
